ogTitle: Ramsgate Beach vs Randwick: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ramsgate Beach and Randwick.
heading: Ramsgate Beach vs Randwick — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ramsgate Beach, New South Wales and Randwick, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Randwick has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Ramsgate Beach (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ramsgate Beach or Randwick safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ramsgate Beach has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Randwick scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ramsgate Beach scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Randwick scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ramsgate Beach or Randwick?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Randwick has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
